$roomCode..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('ownerId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players/p1/id').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players/p2/id').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('players/p2/id').val() === auth.uid)

$playerId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('playerId').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('playerId').val() === auth.uid)
